---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Neuron AI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 💡 Why This Is Needed
Explain why this feature would be valuable:
- Use case:
- Who benefits:
- Current limitations without it:

## 🔍 Possible Implementation
If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here.

## 🧠 Architecture Impact
Does this affect the model architecture? (GLT, ADL, Anchor Attention, PMB)
- [ ] No — implementation-only change
- [ ] Yes — see details below

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples here.
